rulings.Case Title: VATCHE CABAYAN M.D. VS. STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion With Deposition Subpoenas For Personal Appearance And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 10, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFF VATCHE CABAYAN M.D., VATCHE CABAYAN MEDICAL CORPORATION Motion With Deposition Subpoenas For Personal Appearance And Request For Monetary Sanctions. MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF 3RD PARTY MICHELLE LAWLER IS DENIED. NEITHER THIS 3RD PARTY NOR THE SEDGWICK FIRM DID ANY WORK NOR HAD ANY DEALINGS WITH THE DEFENDANT. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT THIS PARTY HAS ANY RELEVANT INFORMATION REGARDING THIS CASE OR THE ANTI-SLAPP ISSUES. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: VATCHE CABAYAN M.D. VS. STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relief From Anti-Slapp Discovery Stay
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 10, 2011, line 3, PLAINTIFF VATCHE CABAYAN M.D., VATCHE CABAYAN MEDICAL CORPORATION Motion For Relief From Anti-Slapp Discovery Stay. MOTION GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO DEPOSE DANA KEALOHA AND KATHY SIMPSON. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF WILL BE LIMITED TO QUESTIONS RELATED TO THE CLAIMS HANDLING PRACTICES AND THE ISSUES RELEVANT TO THE ANTI-SLAPP MOTION. THE DEPOSITION MUST BE COMPLETED BY JUNE 10, 2011. =(302/LMG)
